title_header: Master's and Doctorate Selection Process – PPGI/UFAM
title: Application Form – Master's and Doctorate Selection Process (PPGI/UFAM)

new_inscription.title: New Application:
new_inscription.description: select this option if you have not yet started your application. (Note that you must submit a separate application for each PPGI call.)

continue_inscription.title: Continue Application:
continue_inscription.description: select this option if you have already started your application but have not completed it.
